global_summary: This week demands 103 work-days across nine projects—88 due by today, yet only 28 earned, and just 2 of 4 planned starts began. Every project trails its weekly plan, echoing last week's clean sweep of misses (Jul 13-19). Push the inspections and trims due by Sun Jul 26 to close the gap.

22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Behind this week's plan with 0 of 1 work-day earned; slip 57%. Book the FINAL BUILDING INSPECTION now to save the week.

22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Behind this week's plan, 9 of 27 work-days earned; slip 68%. Install tiles by Wed Jul 29 to stem the August spillover.

22PCPuWPndkt.text: Only 1 of 10 work-days earned; slip 64%, but week still savable. Pass FINAL BUILDING INSPECTION by Sat Jul 25.
